tech_news.title: Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 3 announced for Switch 2, PC - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Inti Creates has announced 2D action game sequel Gunvolt Chronicles: Luminous Avenger iX 3 for Switch 2 and PC (Steam). It will launch in 2027.

tech_news.title: 'Warhammer 40k: Chaos Gate - Deathwatch' Announced, Featuring Elite Xeno-Hunting Specialists - Inven Global
tech_news.description: On the 22nd, during the 'Warhammer Skulls 2026' showcase, Games Workshop unveiled 'Warhammer 40k: Chaos Gate - Deathwatch,' a new title developed by Complex Games and to be published by Frontier Developments.

tech_news.title: Bungie Plans Layoffs After Ending ‘Destiny 2’ Development - Bloomberg
tech_news.description: The Sony subsidiary will focus on ‘Marathon’ rather than jumping directly to ‘Destiny 3’

tech_news.title: Anker’s new earbuds are the first with its AI chip that boosts noise reduction - theverge.com
tech_news.description: The Liberty 5 Pro and Liberty 5 Pro Max are Anker’s first earbuds to feature its dedicated AI chip for reducing noise and improving voice clarity during calls.

tech_news.title: ‘GTA 6’ Price Still Not Revealed, but Take-Two Chief Says Rockstar on Track to Begin Marketing This Summer - Variety
tech_news.description: "Grand Theft Auto 6" does not yet have an announced price, and Take-Two Interactive CEO Strauss Zelnick has revealed why.

tech_news.title: Firefox is working on a rounded redesign with easy-to-find controls for privacy and AI - theverge.com
tech_news.description: Mozilla’s Project Nova redesign for Firefox will give the browser a rounded UI and make it easier to find privacy settings, including Firefox’s AI Controls.
